title: Crafting a Persuasive Business Pitch
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a persuasive business pitch for a startup funding proposal. The pitch should be a combination of text, images, and numerical data. The output should be a PowerPoint presentation representing the pitch.
constraints: Must include at least 3 key performance indicators (KPIs)
Must use 'storytelling' techniques to engage the audience

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the generated pitch clear, concise, and easy to understand?
Is the generated pitch convincing, with strong arguments and data to support the proposal?
Are the visual aids (e.g. images, charts) properly implemented, with clear and concise labels?
